martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, perfect morning for a run, 07:00–09:00 looks ideal with calm winds and a comfortable 18°C. Don't forget sunscreen, it's going to be a sunny one. If you can drag Britt along, even better, but either way, you've earned a cold drink after.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, running looks great today, especially if you can get out between 07:00–09:00 when it's a bit cooler and the wind is calm. Temperature's around 18°C, perfect for a morning jog. Maybe drag Martha along if she's free, and you can both grab a drink on the terrace afterwards.
